job.title: UI/UX Designer II-2
job.description: Design and lead UX for web and mobile products: prototype, conduct user research and testing, create visual designs, mentor junior designers, collaborate with stakeholders and developers, and ensure responsive, SEO-conscious omnichannel experiences.
